creator: st.witzel@web.de
text:
Java programs like jext and jedit stop after clicking outside the program
window. No error message. There is no problem with java programs that run
without gui and other X11-programs.

diablo-jdk-1.5.0.07.01_10
xorg-7.3_2
xfce-4.4.2_1

Hardware: DELL Lattitude 800

How-To-Repeat: Start Program and click outside the program window.
